description: Composition:Royal blue round neck t-shirt made of 70% cotton and 30% viscose, with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside-out in shade 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Regular FitSummer's all about fun 'n' frolick. Go all out and have a blast in this royal blue round neck tee from mr.men. Team this with jeans or cargoes for that absolutely casual, cool look during outings with friends.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
